title: gendarussa sericea
intro: Gendarussa sericea, also known as Java tea or Javanese tea, is a type of medicinal plant native to Indonesia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestive health. Gendarussa sericea is commonly prepared as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the leaf extract with a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
